image_prompt: A minimalist and contemplative art piece featuring a modern, elegant mirror. The mirror's frame is sleek and understated, perhaps brushed metal or dark wood. Instead of a literal reflection, the mirror's surface displays a serene, abstract representation of a person's inner self: a gentle swirl of cosmic dust and soft, glowing colors (like nebula patterns) forming a subtle, ethereal human silhouette. The Portuguese sentence 'No espelho, você se encontra!' is subtly etched onto the mirror's glass, appearing as if a part of the reflection itself, with a slight iridescent sheen. The room around is softly lit, creating a tranquil and introspective atmosphere. High-quality render, dreamlike aesthetic, conceptual art.
caption: Mais do que apenas uma imagem, o espelho é um convite diário para um encontro consigo mesmo. ✨ O que você mais gosta de ver refletido? Seja a sua beleza exterior ou a força interior! #AutoReflexão #EspelhoDaAlma #VerdadesSimples #SeEncontre #AmorPróprio
